comment: Add ss_temp_users and ss_active_temp_users to site_stats table

before.name: site_stats
before.comment: Contains a single row with some aggregate info on the state of the site.

columns.name: ss_row_id
columns.comment: The single row should contain 1 here.

columns.name: ss_total_pages
columns.comment: Total pages, theoretically equal to SELECT COUNT(*) FROM page.

columns.name: ss_users
columns.comment: Number of users, theoretically equal to SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user.

columns.name: ss_active_users
columns.comment: Number of users that still edit.

columns.name: ss_images
columns.comment: Number of images, equivalent to SELECT COUNT(*) FROM image.

after.name: site_stats
after.comment: Contains a single row with some aggregate info on the state of the site.

columns.name: ss_row_id
columns.comment: The single row should contain 1 here.

columns.name: ss_total_pages
columns.comment: Total pages, theoretically equal to SELECT COUNT(*) FROM page.

columns.name: ss_users
columns.comment: Number of users, excluding temporary accounts. See SiteStatsInit::users().

columns.name: ss_active_users
columns.comment: Number of users that still edit.

columns.name: ss_images
columns.comment: Number of images, equivalent to SELECT COUNT(*) FROM image.

columns.name: ss_temp_users
columns.comment: Number of temporary accounts, which are not counted in ss_users.

columns.name: ss_active_temp_users
columns.comment: Number of temporary accounts that still edit, not counted in ss_active_users.
